description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a simplified, cartoon-like appearance. The person has a round head, short hair, and a neutral facial expression. The figure is dressed in a short-sleeved shirt and long pants, with visible shoes on both feet. The arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the legs are straight and parallel. The proportions are slightly exaggerated, with a large head and slim limbs, giving the figure a friendly and approachable look. The overall design is minimalistic, with smooth surfaces and no visible accessories or carried items.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with short hair, a short-sleeved shirt, long pants, and shoes, depicted in a neutral standing pose with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full frontal details of the shirt, pants, and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, pants, and shoes, with both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt and long pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
